scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @openslin/shared --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @openslin/api --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @openslin/worker --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @openslin/device-agent --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @openslin/runner --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @openslin/admin-cli --if-present run clean
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @openslin/shared run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/api run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/worker run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/device-agent run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/runner run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/admin-cli run build && pnpm --filter @openslin/web run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @openslin/api run test && pnpm --filter @openslin/device-agent run test && pnpm --filter @openslin/web run test && pnpm --filter @openslin/worker run test && pnpm --filter @openslin/shared run test
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run boundary-scan && pnpm run build && pnpm test
scripts.verify:arch07: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm test
